name: Segment
shortDescription: Manage your entire Segment workspace with the Segment Public (management) API - Sources, Destinations, Tracking Plans, Warehouses, Destination Filters, Functions, Engage Audiences (schedules, previews, destination connections, activations), Unify Computed Traits and Space Filters, Reverse ETL, Profiles Sync, Selective Sync, Live Plugins, dbt, Transformations, Deletion & Suppression, Delivery Overview metrics, IAM (users, invites, groups, roles), Labels, Audit Trail, Usage, and Customer Insights - no code, with searchable dropdowns for every resource. It also sends live events to Segment's Tracking API (data plane) - Track, Identify, Group, Page, Screen, Alias, and Batch.

actions.name: Track Event
actions.description: Records an action a user or group performed, e.g. "Order Completed", along with any properties describing it. Sent to the Segment Tracking API (data plane) using the source Write Key config item, not the workspace API Token. Requires a User ID, an Anonymous ID, or both, to identify who performed the event.

actions.name: Identify User
actions.description: Ties a user to their actions and records traits about them, e.g. name, email, or plan. Sent to the Segment Tracking API (data plane) using the source Write Key config item. Requires a User ID, an Anonymous ID, or both.

actions.name: Group User
actions.description: Associates an identified or anonymous user with a group, e.g. a company, organization, or account, and records traits about that group. Sent to the Segment Tracking API (data plane) using the source Write Key config item.

actions.name: Track Page View
actions.description: Records a website page view, along with optional properties about the page. Sent to the Segment Tracking API (data plane) using the source Write Key config item. Requires a User ID, an Anonymous ID, or both.

actions.name: Track Screen View
actions.description: Records a mobile app screen view, along with optional properties about the screen. Sent to the Segment Tracking API (data plane) using the source Write Key config item. Requires a User ID, an Anonymous ID, or both.

actions.name: Alias User
actions.description: Merges a previous, typically anonymous, identity with a new, typically known, User ID for the same user. Sent to the Segment Tracking API (data plane) using the source Write Key config item. Use this when a previously-anonymous user becomes identified (e.g. signs up or logs in).

actions.name: Send Batch Events
actions.description: Sends up to 500 Track/Identify/Group/Page/Screen/Alias calls in a single request (max ~500KB total, 32KB per call). Sent to the Segment Tracking API (data plane) using the source Write Key config item. Use this to reduce round-trips when sending many events at once.

actions.name: Get Workspace
actions.description: Returns the Segment workspace the API token belongs to, including its id, name, and slug. Use this to confirm which workspace your token targets before managing Sources, Destinations, or other resources.

actions.name: List Sources
actions.description: Returns a page of Sources in the workspace. Use this to browse your data Sources or find a Source ID before getting, updating, or deleting one.

actions.name: Get Source
actions.description: Retrieves a single Source by its ID, including its write keys, settings, and metadata. The Source field is a dropdown backed by a dictionary so you can pick instead of pasting an ID.

actions.name: Create Source
actions.description: Creates a new data Source in the workspace from a Source type (metadata id) picked from the catalog. Use this to connect a new website, app, or server that will send data into Segment.

actions.name: Update Source
actions.description: Updates an existing Source's name, slug, enabled state, or settings. Use this to rename a Source or pause/resume its data flow without recreating it.

actions.name: Delete Source
actions.description: Permanently deletes a Source and stops it from sending data. This cannot be undone, so use Get Source first to confirm the right Source.

actions.name: List Destinations
actions.description: Returns a page of Destinations in the workspace. Use this to browse where your data is sent or find a Destination ID before getting, updating, or deleting one.

actions.name: Get Destination
actions.description: Retrieves a single Destination by its ID, including its settings, metadata, and the Source it receives data from. The Destination field is a dropdown backed by a dictionary.

actions.name: Create Destination
actions.description: Connects a new Destination to a Source so Segment forwards that Source's data to a tool such as Amplitude or Mixpanel. Pick the Source and the Destination type, then supply the tool's configuration as Settings.

actions.name: Update Destination
actions.description: Updates an existing Destination's name, enabled state, or settings. Use this to rotate an API key, pause data flow, or rename a Destination without recreating it.

actions.name: Delete Destination
actions.description: Permanently deletes a Destination and stops Segment from forwarding data to it. This cannot be undone, so use Get Destination first to confirm the right one.

actions.name: List Destination Filters
actions.description: Returns the filters configured on a Destination. Filters drop or sample events before they reach the Destination. Use this to review a Destination's filters or find a filter ID.

actions.name: Get Destination Filter
actions.description: Retrieves a single Destination filter by its ID, including its FQL condition and actions. Use List Destination Filters to find the filter ID.

actions.name: Create Destination Filter
actions.description: Adds a filter to a Destination that drops, samples, or trims event properties based on an FQL condition. Use this to keep specific events or fields out of a downstream tool.

actions.name: Update Destination Filter
actions.description: Updates an existing Destination filter's condition, actions, title, description, or enabled state. Use this to adjust which events a Destination receives without recreating the filter.

actions.name: Delete Destination Filter
actions.description: Permanently removes a filter from a Destination, so the events it was dropping or sampling flow through again. This cannot be undone.

actions.name: List Tracking Plans
actions.description: Returns a page of Tracking Plans, optionally filtered by type. Tracking Plans define and validate the events and properties your Sources are allowed to send. Requires the Protocols feature.

actions.name: Get Tracking Plan
actions.description: Retrieves a single Tracking Plan by its ID, including its type and resource schema id. The Tracking Plan field is a dropdown backed by a dictionary.

actions.name: Create Tracking Plan
actions.description: Creates a new Tracking Plan to govern which events and properties your Sources may send. Requires the Protocols feature enabled on the workspace. Use Live for a standard event-validation plan.

actions.name: Update Tracking Plan
actions.description: Updates an existing Tracking Plan's name or description. Use this to rename a plan or refine its description without recreating it.

actions.name: Delete Tracking Plan
actions.description: Permanently deletes a Tracking Plan, removing its event/property validation rules. This cannot be undone, so use Get Tracking Plan first to confirm the right one.

actions.name: List Warehouses
actions.description: Returns a page of Warehouses (data destinations such as Snowflake or BigQuery) connected to the workspace. Use this to browse Warehouses or find a Warehouse ID.

actions.name: Get Warehouse
actions.description: Retrieves a single Warehouse by its ID, including its connector metadata and (non-secret) settings. The Warehouse field is a dropdown backed by a dictionary.

actions.name: Create Warehouse
actions.description: Connects a new data Warehouse (e.g. Snowflake, BigQuery, Redshift) to the workspace so Segment can sync data into it. Provide the Warehouse type and its connection details as Settings. (Settings keys and values are connector-specific - verify against a live workspace.)

actions.name: Update Warehouse
actions.description: Updates an existing Warehouse's connection settings, name, or enabled state. The Segment API requires the full Settings object on update. (Settings keys and values are connector-specific - verify against a live workspace.)

actions.name: Delete Warehouse
actions.description: Permanently deletes a Warehouse connection and stops Segment from syncing data into it. This cannot be undone, so use Get Warehouse first to confirm the right one.

actions.name: List Functions
actions.description: Returns a page of Functions, optionally filtered by type. Functions are custom JavaScript that ingest, transform, or send data in Segment. Requires the Functions feature.

actions.name: Get Function
actions.description: Retrieves a single Function by its ID, including its source code and resource type. The Function field is a dropdown backed by a dictionary.

actions.name: Create Function
actions.description: Creates a new custom Function from JavaScript source code. Source/Destination functions ingest or send data; Insert functions transform events in the pipeline. Requires the Functions feature. (Code and Settings are user-authored - verify against a live workspace.)

actions.name: Update Function
actions.description: Updates an existing Function's code, settings, display name, logo, or description. Use this to ship a new version of a Function's logic without recreating it. (Code and Settings are user-authored - verify against a live workspace.)

actions.name: Delete Function
actions.description: Permanently deletes a Function. Any Sources or Destinations built on it stop working, so confirm with Get Function first. This cannot be undone.

actions.name: List Spaces
actions.description: Returns the Engage Spaces in the workspace. A Space is the root scope for Audiences, Computed Traits, and other Engage/Unify resources. Use this to find a Space ID.

actions.name: Get Space
actions.description: Retrieves a single Engage Space by its ID, including its name and slug. The Space field is a dropdown backed by a dictionary.

actions.name: List Audiences
actions.description: Returns a page of Audiences in an Engage Space. Use this to browse Audiences or find an Audience ID before getting, updating, or deleting one. Requires the Engage entitlement.

actions.name: Get Audience
actions.description: Retrieves a single Audience by its ID, including its definition query, type, and status. The Audience field is a dropdown backed by a dictionary that depends on the chosen Space.

actions.name: Create Audience
actions.description: Creates a new Audience in an Engage Space from a definition query. The query is written in Segment's audience query language (FQL) and is user-authored. Requires the Engage entitlement.

actions.name: Update Audience
actions.description: Updates an existing Audience's name, description, enabled state, definition, or options. The definition query is user-authored FQL. Use this to refine an audience without recreating it.

actions.name: Delete Audience
actions.description: Permanently removes an Audience from a Space. This cannot be undone, so use Get Audience first to confirm the right one.

actions.name: Execute Audience Run
actions.description: Forces an Audience to recompute now, outside its normal schedule. Takes no request body. Use this to refresh audience membership immediately after a definition change.

actions.name: List Audience Schedules
actions.description: Returns the compute schedules configured on an Audience. Use this to review when an audience recomputes or find a schedule ID.

actions.name: Get Audience Schedule
actions.description: Retrieves a single Audience schedule by its ID, including its strategy and config. Use List Audience Schedules to find the schedule ID.

actions.name: Add Audience Schedule
actions.description: Adds a compute schedule to an Audience. The config shape depends on the chosen strategy (Periodic vs Specific Days) and is user-authored.

actions.name: Update Audience Schedule
actions.description: Updates an existing Audience schedule's strategy and config. Use this to change when an audience recomputes without recreating the schedule.

actions.name: Delete Audience Schedule
actions.description: Permanently removes a compute schedule from an Audience. The audience stops recomputing on that schedule. This cannot be undone.

actions.name: Create Audience Preview
actions.description: Starts an ephemeral preview computation for an audience query without creating an audience. Returns a preview ID to poll with Get Audience Preview. The query is user-authored FQL.

actions.name: Get Audience Preview
actions.description: Retrieves the status and results of a previously-started audience preview. Poll this with the preview ID from Create Audience Preview until status is complete.

actions.name: Add Destination to Audience
actions.description: Connects a destination to an Audience so its membership can be activated to that tool. The destination and connection settings are connector-specific and user-authored.

actions.name: List Audience Destinations
actions.description: Returns the destination connections attached to an Audience. Use this to review where an audience activates or find a connection ID before adding an activation.

actions.name: Update Audience Destination
actions.description: Updates a destination connection on an Audience - its ID-sync rules or connection settings. Both are connector-specific and user-authored.

actions.name: Remove Audience Destination
actions.description: Permanently removes a destination connection from an Audience. The audience stops activating to that destination. This cannot be undone.

actions.name: Add Activation
actions.description: Adds an activation to a destination connection so audience membership changes are sent to the destination. Personalization and destination mapping are user-authored objects.

actions.name: List Activations
actions.description: Returns the activations configured on an Audience. Use this to review or find an activation ID before getting, updating, or removing one.

actions.name: Get Activation
actions.description: Retrieves a single activation by its ID, including its type, personalization, and destination mapping. Use List Activations to find the activation ID.

actions.name: Update Activation
actions.description: Updates an activation's name, enabled state, resync flag, personalization, or destination mapping. Personalization and destination mapping are user-authored objects.

actions.name: Remove Activation
actions.description: Permanently removes an activation from an Audience. The destination stops receiving that audience's membership events. This cannot be undone.

actions.name: List Supported Destinations
actions.description: Returns the destinations (and their actions) that support activation for a given audience type in a Space. Use this to discover which destination to connect and its available actions.

actions.name: List Computed Traits
actions.description: Returns a page of Computed Traits in an Engage Space. Use this to browse traits or find a trait ID. Requires the Unify entitlement.

actions.name: Get Computed Trait
actions.description: Retrieves a single Computed Trait by its ID, including its definition query and type. The trait field is a dropdown backed by a dictionary that depends on the chosen Space.

actions.name: Create Computed Trait
actions.description: Creates a new Computed Trait in an Engage Space from a definition query and type. The query is user-authored FQL. Requires the Unify entitlement.

actions.name: Update Computed Trait
actions.description: Updates an existing Computed Trait's name, description, enabled state, or definition. The definition query is user-authored FQL.

actions.name: Delete Computed Trait
actions.description: Permanently removes a Computed Trait from a Space. This cannot be undone, so use Get Computed Trait first to confirm the right one.

actions.name: List Space Filters
actions.description: Returns the profile/event filters configured on an Engage Space. Use this to review a Space's filters or find a filter ID.

actions.name: Get Space Filter
actions.description: Retrieves a single Space Filter by its ID, including its FQL condition. Pick a Space to populate the filter dropdown, then choose the filter.

actions.name: Create Space Filter
actions.description: Creates a profile/event filter on an Engage Space based on an FQL condition. Use this to block or drop events from a Space's profiles.

actions.name: Update Space Filter
actions.description: Updates an existing Space Filter's name, condition, enabled state, or drop behavior. Pick the Space to populate the filter dropdown. Provide at least one field to change.

actions.name: Delete Space Filter
actions.description: Permanently removes a Space Filter. The events it was blocking flow through again. Pick a Space to populate the filter dropdown. This cannot be undone.

actions.name: List Reverse ETL Models
actions.description: Returns a page of Reverse ETL Models in the workspace. Each model is a SQL query that extracts rows from a connected warehouse Source. Use this to browse models or find a model ID. Requires a Reverse-ETL-capable Source.

actions.name: Get Reverse ETL Model
actions.description: Retrieves a single Reverse ETL Model by its ID, including its SQL query and identifier column. The Model field is a dropdown backed by a dictionary.

actions.name: Create Reverse ETL Model
actions.description: Creates a Reverse ETL Model: a SQL query that extracts rows from a connected warehouse Source so they can be synced out to destinations. The query is user-authored SQL.

actions.name: Update Reverse ETL Model
actions.description: Updates an existing Reverse ETL Model's name, description, enabled state, SQL query, or identifier column. Use this to refine a model without recreating it.

actions.name: Delete Reverse ETL Model
actions.description: Permanently deletes a Reverse ETL Model. This cannot be undone, so use Get Reverse ETL Model first to confirm the right one.

actions.name: Create Reverse ETL Manual Sync
actions.description: Triggers a manual Reverse ETL sync for a model + mapping (subscription). Use this to run a sync now outside its normal schedule. Rate limit 20/min.

actions.name: Get Reverse ETL Sync Status
actions.description: Retrieves the status of one Reverse ETL sync run, including its extract and load phase counts. Use the Sync ID returned by Create Reverse ETL Manual Sync.

actions.name: List Reverse ETL Sync Statuses
actions.description: Returns a page of sync statuses for a model + mapping (subscription). Use this to review recent syncs. This endpoint uses plain count/cursor query params (not Segment's dotted pagination).

actions.name: Cancel Reverse ETL Sync
actions.description: Cancels an in-progress Reverse ETL sync, recording a reason. Use the Sync ID returned by Create Reverse ETL Manual Sync.

actions.name: List Profiles Warehouses
actions.description: Returns the Profiles Sync warehouses configured on an Engage Space. Use this to review where profile data is synced or find a profiles-warehouse ID. Requires a Profiles-Sync-enabled Space.

actions.name: Create Profiles Warehouse
actions.description: Connects a warehouse to an Engage Space so Segment syncs profile data into it. Pick the warehouse type and supply the connection Settings, which are connector-specific.

actions.name: Update Profiles Warehouse
actions.description: Updates a Profiles Sync warehouse's settings, name, enabled state, or schema name. Use List Profiles Warehouses to find the warehouse ID.

actions.name: Delete Profiles Warehouse
actions.description: Permanently removes a Profiles Sync warehouse from a Space. This cannot be undone.

actions.name: List Profiles Selective Syncs
actions.description: Returns the selective-sync collection settings for a Profiles Sync warehouse, showing which collections and properties sync. Use List Profiles Warehouses to find the warehouse ID.

actions.name: Update Profiles Selective Sync
actions.description: Updates which collections and properties a Profiles Sync warehouse syncs, via per-connector settings and optional sync overrides.

actions.name: Get Advanced Sync Schedule
actions.description: Returns the advanced sync schedule for a Warehouse, listing the hours of day it syncs and its timezone. Rate limit 2/min.

actions.name: Replace Advanced Sync Schedule
actions.description: Replaces the advanced sync schedule for a Warehouse with a new set of sync hours and timezone. Rate limit 2/min.

actions.name: List Warehouse Selective Syncs
actions.description: Returns the selective-sync property settings for a Source connected to a Warehouse, showing which collections and properties sync. Rate limit 2/min.

actions.name: List Warehouse Syncs
actions.description: Returns the recent sync reports for a Warehouse across all its connected Sources. Rate limit 2/min.

actions.name: List Warehouse Source Syncs
actions.description: Returns the recent sync reports for one Source connected to a Warehouse. Rate limit 2/min.

actions.name: Update Warehouse Selective Sync
actions.description: Applies per-property selective-sync overrides for a Warehouse, controlling which Source collections and properties sync. Rate limit 2/min.

actions.name: Create Live Plugin
actions.description: Uploads (creates or replaces) the Live Plugin JavaScript code for a Source. Requires Live Plugins enabled on the Source. The code is user-authored.

actions.name: Get Latest Live Plugin
actions.description: Retrieves the latest Live Plugin for a Source, including its version and download URL.

actions.name: Delete Live Plugin Code
actions.description: Permanently deletes the Live Plugin code for a Source. This cannot be undone.

actions.name: Create dbt Model Sync
actions.description: Triggers a dbt model sync for a Source. The exact path and request body for this endpoint could not be confirmed from the docs (the dbt tag is JS-rendered), so confirm it against a live workspace before relying on it. Rate limit 10/min.

actions.name: List Transformations
actions.description: Returns a page of Transformations in the workspace. Transformations rename, drop, or rewrite events from a Source before they reach destinations. Use this to browse or find a transformation ID.

actions.name: Get Transformation
actions.description: Retrieves a single Transformation by its ID, including its FQL condition and transform rules. The Transformation field is a dropdown backed by a dictionary.

actions.name: Create Transformation
actions.description: Creates a Transformation that rewrites a Source's events (rename event, rename properties, drop, hash, etc.) based on an FQL condition before they reach destinations. The condition and transform rules are user-authored.

actions.name: Update Transformation
actions.description: Updates an existing Transformation's name, source, condition, or transform rules. Use this to refine a transformation without recreating it.

actions.name: Delete Transformation
actions.description: Permanently deletes a Transformation. This cannot be undone, so use Get Transformation first to confirm the right one.

actions.name: Create Workspace Regulation
actions.description: Creates a data deletion/suppression regulation across the whole workspace for the given subjects. DESTRUCTIVE - permanently deletes or suppresses user data. Use with care.

actions.name: Create Source Regulation
actions.description: Creates a data deletion/suppression regulation scoped to one Source. DESTRUCTIVE - permanently deletes or suppresses user data from that Source.

actions.name: Create Cloud Source Regulation
actions.description: Creates a data deletion/suppression regulation for a cloud Source collection. DESTRUCTIVE - permanently deletes or suppresses object data from that collection.

actions.name: List Workspace Regulations
actions.description: Returns a page of deletion/suppression regulations in the workspace, optionally filtered by status or type. Use this to track regulation progress or find a regulate ID.

actions.name: List Source Regulations
actions.description: Returns a page of deletion/suppression regulations scoped to one Source, optionally filtered by status or type.

actions.name: Get Regulation
actions.description: Retrieves the status of a single regulation by its regulate ID, including overall status and per-stream status. Use the regulate ID returned by a Create Regulation action.

actions.name: List Suppressions
actions.description: Returns a page of the workspace's current suppressions (subjects whose data is suppressed).

actions.name: Get Egress Success Metrics
actions.description: Returns successful-delivery (egress) metrics for a Source->Destination pair over a time window. MINUTE granularity allows max 4h within the last 48h; HOUR max 14d within the last 30d; DAY max 30d within the last 30d.

actions.name: Get Egress Failed Metrics
actions.description: Returns failed-delivery (egress) metrics for a Source->Destination pair over a time window. MINUTE max 4h/last 48h; HOUR max 14d/last 30d; DAY max 30d/last 30d.

actions.name: Get Filtered At Destination Metrics
actions.description: Returns metrics for events filtered at the Destination for a Source->Destination pair over a time window. MINUTE max 4h/last 48h; HOUR max 14d/last 30d; DAY max 30d/last 30d.

actions.name: Get Filtered At Source Metrics
actions.description: Returns metrics for events filtered at the Source over a time window. MINUTE max 4h/last 48h; HOUR max 14d/last 30d; DAY max 30d/last 30d.

actions.name: Get Ingress Failed Metrics
actions.description: Returns failed-on-ingest (ingress) metrics for a Source over a time window. MINUTE max 4h/last 48h; HOUR max 14d/last 30d; DAY max 30d/last 30d.

actions.name: Get Ingress Success Metrics
actions.description: Returns successfully-received (ingress) metrics for a Source over a time window. MINUTE max 4h/last 48h; HOUR max 14d/last 30d; DAY max 30d/last 30d.

actions.name: List Users
actions.description: Returns a page of workspace Users. Use this to browse members or find a user ID. Rate limit 60/min.

actions.name: Get User
actions.description: Retrieves a single workspace User by ID, including their assigned roles and resource permissions. The User field is a dropdown backed by a dictionary. Rate limit 60/min.

actions.name: Delete Users
actions.description: Removes one or more Users from the workspace. DESTRUCTIVE - the users lose access. Rate limit 60/min.

actions.name: List User Groups from User
actions.description: Returns the User Groups a given User belongs to. Rate limit 60/min.

actions.name: Add User Permissions
actions.description: Adds role + resource permissions to a User. Use Get Roles Dictionary to pick role IDs. Rate limit 60/min.

actions.name: Replace User Permissions
actions.description: Replaces ALL of a User's permissions with the provided set. Use Get Roles Dictionary to pick role IDs. Rate limit 60/min.

actions.name: Create Invites
actions.description: Invites one or more people to the workspace with their permissions. Use Get Roles Dictionary to pick role IDs.

actions.name: List Invites
actions.description: Returns a page of pending workspace invites (email addresses).

actions.name: Delete Invites
actions.description: Revokes pending workspace invites by email. DESTRUCTIVE - the invited people can no longer accept.

actions.name: List User Groups
actions.description: Returns a page of workspace User Groups. Use this to browse groups or find a group ID.

actions.name: Get User Group
actions.description: Retrieves a single User Group by ID, including its member count and permissions. The Group field is a dropdown backed by a dictionary.

actions.name: Create User Group
actions.description: Creates a new User Group in the workspace. Add members and permissions afterward with the related actions.

actions.name: Update User Group
actions.description: Renames a User Group.

actions.name: Delete User Group
actions.description: Permanently deletes a User Group. This cannot be undone.

actions.name: Add Users to User Group
actions.description: Adds users (by email) to a User Group.

actions.name: List Users from User Group
actions.description: Returns the users that belong to a User Group.

actions.name: Replace Users in User Group
actions.description: Replaces ALL members of a User Group with the provided emails.

actions.name: Remove Users from User Group
actions.description: Removes users (by email) from a User Group. DESTRUCTIVE - those users lose the group's permissions.

actions.name: List Invites from User Group
actions.description: Returns the pending invites attached to a User Group.

actions.name: Add User Group Permissions
actions.description: Adds role + resource permissions to a User Group. Use Get Roles Dictionary to pick role IDs.

actions.name: Replace User Group Permissions
actions.description: Replaces ALL of a User Group's permissions with the provided set. Use Get Roles Dictionary to pick role IDs.

actions.name: List Roles
actions.description: Lists the Roles available to assign in permissions (used to pick a roleId).

actions.name: List Labels
actions.description: Returns all labels defined in the workspace. Labels are key/value tags applied to resources for organization and access control.

actions.name: Create Label
actions.description: Creates a label (key/value tag) in the workspace. Rate limit 60/min.

actions.name: Delete Label
actions.description: Permanently deletes a label by its key and value. This cannot be undone. Rate limit 60/min.

actions.name: List Audit Events
actions.description: Returns a page of workspace audit-trail events (resource created/updated/deleted, member changes, etc.), optionally filtered by time window or resource.

actions.name: Get Daily Workspace API Calls
actions.description: Returns the daily API-call usage for the whole workspace in a given month.

actions.name: Get Daily Per Source API Calls
actions.description: Returns the daily per-Source API-call usage for the workspace in a given month.

actions.name: Create Customer Insights Download
actions.description: Generates presigned download URLs for Customer Insights data for a collection and hour bucket. Data is hourly with one-month retention. Rate limit 120 requests/day per workspace.

idealUseCases: Provision Sources and connect them to Destinations, Warehouses, and Reverse ETL models.
Build, schedule, preview, and activate Engage Audiences and Unify Computed Traits.
Govern data: run Deletion & Suppression regulations, manage IAM users/groups/roles and Labels.
Monitor delivery, API-call usage, and the audit trail - and react when new audit events occur.
agentIdeas: When a **Segment** "New Audit Event" trigger fires for a destructive change, use **PagerDuty** "Create Incident" to page the on-call owner about the workspace configuration change.
Poll **Segment** "New Audit Event" and post each event to a governance channel with **Slack** "Send Message To Channel" so the data team has a live audit feed.

Pull usage with **Segment** "Get Daily Workspace API Calls" (or "Get Daily Per Source API Calls") and append the numbers to a tracking sheet via **Google Sheets** "Add Row" for month-over-month reporting.
When a new lead is captured, use **Segment** "Identify User" to set their traits and "Track Event" to record the signup, feeding the customer profile that downstream Destinations consume.
